mainEntity.name: Where do you pick up at D-Marin Marina Mandalina?

acceptedAnswer.text: Right at the marina, by your berth or the marina reception, whichever suits. Tell me your pontoon or boat name when you book and I will find you.

mainEntity.name: How much is a transfer to Split Airport?

acceptedAnswer.text: A fixed price per car for up to 4 passengers, agreed before you travel, with tolls, fuel and luggage included. See the price list above for every route.

mainEntity.name: How far in advance should I book?

acceptedAnswer.text: At least 2 hours ahead so I can confirm the car and your pickup time, and earlier for early-morning flights and high season. For a sooner ride, call or WhatsApp me directly.
